title: Soccer Game Murdoku
specialRules: Only chairs, players benches and nets can be occupied, other icons cannot.
rules: Place everyone on the grid according to their clue to find the murderer. He was in a region alone with the victim.
Only 1 person per row and per column.
"Beside" means in the same room and orthogonally adjacent.
clues: A (Woman - Amelia). She was a goalkeeper occupying one of the two nets.
B (Woman - Bridget). She was beside the soccer ball.
C (Man - Casper). He was south of an object in the trophy room.
D (Woman - Dolores). She was beside the south net.
E (Woman - Elise). She was sitting in a chair in the North Stands.
F (Woman - Felicia). She was beside a locker.
G (Man - Gerald). He was sitting in the West Stands, but not in the first column.
H (Woman - Hermione). She was not sitting in a chair but was in one of the stands areas, north of Felicia.
I (Woman - Imogen). She was in the Field, south of Hermione.
J (Man - Joel). He was not beside an object in the trohpy room.
K (Man - Kegan). He was sitting on a player bench.
V (Woman - Vera). The victim. She was alone with the murderer.
